title: ice40_dsp, extend_u0 and unextend incorrectly handle sign bits

features.name: signed lut with dsp pass sign handling
features.description: Code should include a signed look-up table accessed in a DSP-enabled synthesis pass where sign bit handling by unextend/extend_u0 causes incorrect results

features.name: signed multiplication with arithmetic right shift
features.description: Code should include a signed multiplication followed by an arithmetic right shift that is affected by incorrect sign extension in DSP pass

features.name: unextend and extend_u0 sign preservation conflict
features.description: Code should include a pattern where unextend strips sign bits while extend_u0 pads with zeros for unsigned signals during DSP optimization
features.snippet: // In DSP pass: unextend removes MSB, extend_u0 pads zeros

features.name: signed constant sign bit lost in unextend
features.description: Code should include a signed constant signal whose sign bit is incorrectly stripped by unextend during DSP optimization
